    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    C

    C - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.PrimaryParameter
     
    calculate(double, double, double) - Static method in class lcr.util.CapacitanceDerivator
    Calculates the complete structural mapping matrix of secondary derived parameter assets based on primary capacitance, dissipation factor loss loops, and operational signal frequencies.
    calculate(double, double, double) - Static method in class lcr.util.ImpedanceDerivator
    Calculates the complete structural mapping matrix of secondary derived parameter assets based on total impedance magnitude, reactive state elements, and operational signal frequencies.
    calculate(double, double, double) - Static method in class lcr.util.InductanceDerivator
    Calculates the complete structural mapping matrix of secondary derived parameter assets based on primary inductance, quality factor vectors, and operational signal frequencies.
    calculate(double, double, double) - Static method in class lcr.util.ResistanceDerivator
    Calculates the complete structural mapping matrix of secondary derived parameter assets based on primary resistance, reactive state elements, and operational signal frequencies.
    CapacitanceDerivator - Class in lcr.util
    Utility calculator processing secondary complex electrical parameters derived from primary Capacitance (C) and Dissipation Factor (D) metrics under dynamic AC test frequencies.
    CapacitanceDerivator() - Constructor for class lcr.util.CapacitanceDerivator
     
    changeAperture(Aperture) - Method in class lcr.controller.MeterController
    Asynchronously updates the measurement integration window speed aperture parameter.
    changeAutoRange(boolean) - Method in class lcr.controller.MeterController
    Asynchronously toggles automatic hardware scale configuration tracking loops.
    changeBias(BiasVoltage) - Method in class lcr.controller.MeterController
    Asynchronously updates the internal physical DC bias injection voltage configuration.
    changeFrequency(Frequency) - Method in class lcr.controller.MeterController
    Asynchronously updates the hardware sampling signal frequency parameter.
    changePrimaryParameter(PrimaryParameter) - Method in class lcr.controller.MeterController
    Asynchronously updates the instrument primary reading display mode selector.
    changeRange(Range) - Method in class lcr.controller.MeterController
    Asynchronously locks the instrument tracking window inside a strict manual scaling bracket.
    changeSecondaryParameter(SecondaryParameter) - Method in class lcr.controller.MeterController
    Asynchronously updates the instrument secondary reading display mode selector.
    changeSeriesMode(SeriesMode) - Method in class lcr.controller.MeterController
    Asynchronously updates the equivalent circuit matching circuit standard topology.
    changeVoltage(Voltage) - Method in class lcr.controller.MeterController
    Asynchronously updates the hardware operational signal voltage limit.
    clear() - Method in class gui.DerivedPanel
     
    clear() - Method in class gui.InfoPanel
    Resets indicators back to a clean default state.
    clear() - Method in class gui.MeasurementPanel
     
    clear() - Method in class gui.StatusBarPanel
     
    clearChart() - Method in class lcr.view.RealTimeChartPanel
    Clears all tracking chart datasets and resets axes scale lines.
    ConfigBusiness - Class in lcr.business
    Controller class responsible for managing and applying hardware configuration parameters sequentially to the LCR meter device.
    ConfigBusiness() - Constructor for class lcr.business.ConfigBusiness
     
    ConfigDTO - Class in lcr.beans
    Data Transfer Object containing the hardware configuration parameters for the LCR meter.
    ConfigDTO(Frequency, Voltage, Aperture, PrimaryParameter, SecondaryParameter, boolean, Range, BiasVoltage, SeriesMode) - Constructor for class lcr.beans.ConfigDTO
    Constructs a full configuration instance.
    ConfigurationPanel - Class in gui
    Sidebar configuration panel containing setup controls for the LCR meter.
    ConfigurationPanel() - Constructor for class gui.ConfigurationPanel
     
    connect() - Method in class lcr.business.ETMeter
     
    connect() - Method in class lcr.business.HiokiMeter
     
    connect() - Method in interface lcr.business.LcrMeter
    Establishes a connection to the hardware meter.
    connect() - Method in class lcr.business.SerialConnection
    Attempts to establish an open serial link with a fallback retry attempt.
    connect() - Method in class lcr.business.TonghuiMeter
     
    connect(String, SupportedMeter) - Method in class lcr.business.MeterBusiness
    Instantiates the matching LcrMeter implementation based on the selected model type and opens the communication channel over the specified serial port link.
    connectButtonPressed(String, SupportedMeter) - Method in class lcr.controller.MeterController
    Handles connection toggle actions from the UI button event, routing either a setup connection flow or an immediate graceful disconnect routine.
    Constants - Class in lcr.util
    System-wide constants container managing user interface text literals, execution log flags, and structural measurement display matrix definitions.
    CSVRecordingRunnable - Class in lcr.business
    Consumer thread runnable that continuously pulls measurement data from a blocking queue and records it into a CSV file.
    CSVRecordingRunnable(File, BlockingQueue) - Constructor for class lcr.business.CSVRecordingRunnable
    Constructs a CSV recording worker.
